## Type

<!-- delete those that don't apply -->
`feat` · `fix` · `chore` · `docs` · `refactor` · `style`

## Screenshots

<!-- Required for any visual change. Include desktop AND 375px (mobile). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes clean
- [ ] `npm run check` passes (0 errors)
- [ ] Checked at 375px and desktop (for visual changes)
- [ ] Keyboard-operable + visible focus ring (for new interactive UI)
- [ ] Respects `prefers-reduced-motion` (for any motion)
- [ ] No new hex colors / one-off pixel values (used design tokens)
- [ ] Facts trace to `docs/FACTS.md` or are tagged `[VERIFY]` + listed in `OPEN-QUESTIONS.md`
- [ ] Preview deploy linked below
